title: Senior Manager, Cocoa Sourcing
description:
About The Role

  • You will be leading a specialized team responsible the procurement and pricing of cocoa raw materials, and developing strategies and policies to enhance profitability. This role shall lead and manage two cocoa buyers to deliver team and region objectives.
  • Working closely with operational staff in regional sites around Asia entails clear, accurate and timely delivery of information and execution. Having a good grasp of market fundamentals like supply and demand, pricing methodologies and hedging tools would enable you to succeed in a key profit center within the firm.

Key Responsibilities Include

  • Responsible for managing regional procurement of Cocoa raw materials into the Chocolate factories
  • Develop commodity trading strategies to enhance positions during various market trends or economic conditions
  • Enhance networks with existing and potential trade partners on both the economic and innovation fronts
  • Support various projects for strategic sourcing, product innovation and budget analysis
  • Lead the team in analyzing market conditions, developing strategies, and executing trades/contracts
  • This position is part of the Asia Trading & Sourcing team, with a strong focus on the sourcing activities for the chocolate factories in AMEA.
  • Willing to travel up to 20% of the time

About You

  • Diploma/Degree in Finance, Accountancy, Computer Science, Statistics or equivalent
  • Fluent in written and spoken English, and preferably a second language
  • Experience with computer systems like Microsoft Programs (Word, Excel, Powerpoint), SAP
  • Additional qualifications like CFA, CAIA and/or experience with trading platforms not limited to Trading Technologies (TT), MetaTrader (MT4), Bloomberg, Reuters, ICE Connect is an added advantage
  • Have a good understanding of the commodities market, preferably Agriculture
  • Minimum 8 years of experience in commodity trading and operations
  • Preferably trading/investment experience in equities or commodities
  • Being able to manage and mentor a team to deliver business objectives
  • Strong business communication and stakeholder management
  • Keen sense of data analytics and interpretation
  • Ability to multi-task and deliver in a high pressure environment
  • Financial modelling and computer programming skills like SQL, Python and/or R is an added advantage

At Barry Callebaut, we are committed to Diversity & Inclusion. United by our strong values, we thrive on the diversity of who we are, where we come from, what we’ve experienced and how we think. We are committed to nurturing an inclusive environment where people can truly be themselves, grow to their full potential and feel they belong.

#oneBC - Diverse People, Sustainable Growth.

postedCompany.description:
Barry Callebaut is the world’s leading manufacturer of high-quality chocolate and cocoa products. Barry Callebaut represents

  • more than 13,000 employees operating out of more than 30 countries
  • more than 66 production facilities
  • annual sales of about CHF 8.1 billion
  • comprehensive competency in the art of making chocolate and cocoa products– from sourcing and processing cocoa beans to producing the finest chocolates, including chocolate fillings, decorations and compounds

We are the global leader in chocolate and cocoa innovations and provide a comprehensive range of services in the fields of product development, processing, training and marketing. Barry Callebaut is committed to a sustainable cocoa production through its “Cocoa Horizons” initiative and to help ensure future supplies of cocoa as well as improve farmer livelihoods.
postedCompany.name: BARRY CALLEBAUT COCOA ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
